headline: 影视圈新片扎堆，痴迷领跑热搜
headlineEn: New Films Flood the Scene, 'Obsession' Tops Hot Searches
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，《末日地堡》等剧集热度不减。本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》等新片来袭，多部续集与改编作品蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' dominates the charts, with 'Silo' and others staying hot. This week sees 'Enola Holmes 3' and more, as sequels and adaptations gear up.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周热度飙升，续集备受期待。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' surges this week, sequel highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》跻身周榜，动画IP持续吸金。
industryHighlights.en: 'Minions and Big Monster' enters weekly chart, animation IP still lucrative.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片定档，暑期档竞争激烈。
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' and others set dates, summer box office heats up.
